failedAssertions.reason: Latency cascade is progressive (db 70 -> 250, order 62 -> 170), but no timeout/error indicator appears in alerts or logs after threshold crossings; required upstream timeout errors were not observed.
Cascade order db -> order -> api is observed, but remediating db via restart does not reduce all tiers (db latency dropped 137.0 -> 67.1 while order rose 118.8 -> 128.1 and api rose 83.5 -> 91.3).

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance for terminal-cli isolation boundaries and evidence/report expectations.
Documented using `uv run`/`.venv/bin/python` for Python tooling because system python may lack pytest.
Documented that bad_config flips health immediately but does not inherently increase latency; metric-restoration tests should pre-establish degraded metrics.
